label: Runway Gen-3 Alpha (Video Generation)
description: Runway Gen-3 Alpha Turbo. Text-to-video and image-to-video with motion and duration control.

text.label: Prompt
text.description: The video generation prompt describing motion and action.

reference_image.label: Start Frame
reference_image.description: Image to use as the first frame.

end_image.label: End Frame
end_image.description: Image to use as the last frame.

motion_strength.label: Motion Strength
motion_strength.description: How much motion to apply. 0 = nearly still, 1 = maximum movement.
